reportabs 0.0.3

    • Plotting ABS Time Series Data
    • Reporting ABS Time Series Data

Change in Living Costs

table_cli.Rd

A gt table of the change in living costs, by category, between the most recent available data and the date specified in since. Includes the change in Manufacturing industry wages over the same period for comparison.

Usage

table_cli(wpi_data, cli_data, since)

Arguments

wpi_data

Wage Price Index (wpi_quarterly) data from read_absdata

cli_data

Living Cost Index data (cli) from read_absdata

since

The date ("%Y-%m-%d) for comparison

Value

A gt table

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
wpi_data <- read_absdata("wpi_quarterly", export_dir = "data")
cli_data <- read_absdata("cli", export_dir = "data")
table_cli(wpi_data, cli_data, "2020-03-01")
} # }
